subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jaipur?
question_hi: जयपुर में किस मंदिर मौजूद है।
explanation_en: Jaigarh Fort is located in Jaipur, which is also known as the Chittorgarh of Rajasthan due to its similar architectural style.
